state.next-action: Phase `12` is complete. `12-03` shipped the inbound Clerk webhook route at `src/app/api/clerk/webhook/route.ts`, Svix verification with `CLERK_WEBHOOK_SIGNING_SECRET`, reconciliation in `src/lib/auth/clerkWebhookSync.ts`, and app-owned auth domain events in `src/lib/auth/domainEvents.ts`, so provider sync now lands in first-party users, organizations, and memberships before downstream consumers react. Closeout verification now passes: focused Vitest and eslint for the provider-sync slice, `npm.cmd exec -- tsc --noEmit` after typing the mutable composer test fixtures, and local `npm.cmd run build`, which completed `Collecting build traces ...` plus `postbuild` with only the previously seen non-blocking GLib warnings. Next action: activate phase `19` and start `19-01` by defining the inbound media ingestion contract around Resend inbound delivery, attachment validation, replay-safe logging, and Payload media handoff.
